description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a broad, rectangular seat and a tall, slightly curved backrest, both upholstered in a smooth, light-colored material. The chair is supported by a central cylindrical column that branches out into a five-pointed star-shaped base, each point ending in a caster wheel for mobility. The seat and backrest appear well-padded, providing comfort for extended sitting, and the backrest is gently contoured for ergonomic support. The chair lacks armrests, giving it a minimalist and open-sided appearance. The base and casters are made of a darker, likely plastic or metal material, contrasting with the lighter upholstery. This chair is suitable for office or indoor urban environments, offering both functionality and a clean, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, armless swivel chair with a padded seat and backrest, supported by a five-caster star base. The chair features light upholstery and a dark, sturdy central support column.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, padded seat and tall, rectangular backrest with no armrests, and the five-pointed base with casters.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the seat and backrest padding, as well as the central support column and the cantilevered seat design.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned backrest and the symmetrical arrangement of the base and casters.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the seat and backrest profile, emphasizing the lack of armrests and the robust central support.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical, dark-colored column made of metal or reinforced plastic, branching into a five-pointed star base with casters.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, and slightly curved backrest with smooth, light-colored upholstery and no visible patterns or cutouts.
